activities.details: Surok Magis wanted to kill King Roald and take over Varrock with his magic, but his evil plan has been scuppered!
I levelled my Woodcutting skill, I am now level 28.
I've learned more about the Mahjarrat and found Jhallan a place to hibernate under the ritual stone.
activities.text: Quest complete: The Tale of the Muspah

activities.details: I levelled my Crafting skill, I am now level 46.
The clay golem had been guarding Uzer for centuries, not knowing that its task was complete. I investigated and put its mind to rest.
I have unlocked a total of 450 songs, the last of which was Looking Back.
After helping Denulth to locate an alternate route up Death Plateau, I was made an honourary member of the Imperial Guard!
Completing Priest in Peril has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 60 QP milestone.
No wonder Paterdomus Temple was unable to send a message to Varrock: there was a guardian, monks of Zamorak and even a vampyre in the way!
I dyed armour different colours to help the goblin generals decide which colour they liked. They ended up where they started, and they stopped fighting!
I levelled my Farming skill, I am now level 18.
I levelled my Agility skill, I am now level 61.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 62.
I killed 8 boss monsters   called:  Hobgoblin Geomancer , a bulwark beast , a skeletal horde and a rammernaut in Daemonheim.
activities.text: I killed 8 boss monsters in Daemonheim.

activities.details: I have breached floor 20 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 42.
I have breached floor 19 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 42.
I have breached floor 18 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 41.
